case_title: HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF VS. WAYNE ROBERT SMITH

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,307.50 FILED BY HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF (SAN FRANCISCO) AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, WAYNE ROBERT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-01-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF (SAN FRANCISCO) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SMITH, WAYNE ROBERT $3,307.50 PRINCIPAL, $65.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,373.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-01-2015 - JUDGMENT.
